title: oldenlandia paradoxa
intro: Oldenlandia paradoxa, also known as Paradoxical Oldenlandia, is a plant species that belongs to the family Rubiaceae and is native to various parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress. Oldenlandia paradoxa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used to treat various ailments in traditional medicine.
